ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "project" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "contract_number" TEXT /* Unique contract number */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contractor */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount in local currency */,
  "executing_ministry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executing ministry */,
  "completion_period" TEXT /* Estimated period for project completion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was initiated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract */,
  "amendment_history" TEXT /* JSON array of contract amendments */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date of the contract */,
  "budget_allocation" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the contract */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget after disbursements */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager responsible for the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES contractors ("contractor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_executing_ministry_id FOREIGN KEY ("executing_ministry_id") REFERENCES executing_ministries ("executing_ministry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contractors" (
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contractor */,
  "contractor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contractor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the contractor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contractor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the contractor */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the contractor was registered */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the contractor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executing_ministries" (
  "executing_ministry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ministry */,
  "ministry_name" TEXT /* Name of the executing ministry */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the ministry */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the ministry */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the ministry */,
  "head_of_ministry" TEXT /* Name of the head of the ministry */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the ministry was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executing_ministry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the project phase */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Planned start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Planned end date of the phase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the phase */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* JSON array of milestones for the phase */,
  "actual_start_date" TEXT /* Actual start date of the phase */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date of the phase */,
  "phase_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phase manager responsible for the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_phases_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_phases_phase_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_records" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount transacted */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., payment, reimbursement) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the transaction */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the transaction */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, financial officer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of user permissions */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
